name: Aurum Hive
updates: On mobile, the minimap and legend overlays now hide while the account detail panel is fully open.
On mobile, the Back to canvas account strip now stays pinned under the Hive header while the detail panel scrolls.
PIN changes now require confirmation and show a keep-your-PIN-safe warning.
Referral links now support native sharing when available, with copy fallback.
PDF exports now include the selected account referral link and QR code when available.
QR display now shows a fallback note if the QR image cannot load.
Search results now offer Show all when more than eight accounts match.
Cloud sync status now clearly shows when local changes are saved but cloud sync is still pending.
[NEW] Starter setup can configure a root account, optional PIN, and three placeholder subaccounts in one guided flow.
On mobile, the account card now starts collapsed when the Hive first opens.
[NEW] Referral links can now reveal a scannable QR code from the selected account summary card.
Search results now include a Clear button to reset matches and remove the pulse highlight.
The account card is now collapsible and shows the selected account name in its header.
[NEW] Search now opens a results panel with matching accounts and Go to actions instead of only jumping silently.
[NEW] Account PIN management now has dedicated Change PIN and Remove PIN actions.
Cloud sync status now reads as a clearer health indicator with friendlier wording.
Mobile Hive controls now have larger touch targets, better toolbar wrapping, and tighter panel spacing.
Hive sync messages now use user-friendly cloud database wording instead of backend provider names.
Add child now asks for the PIN when the selected parent is a protected non-root account, while the loaded root remains unlocked after lookup.
PIN-protected accounts now require the PIN before Edit selected unlocks the account form.
[NEW] PIN-protected accounts now open a polished unlock screen with four PIN slots and a phone-style keypad.
Referral ID lookup now shows the hourglass Loading state while cloud, local, and PIN checks are running.
Name search hits now pulse larger and brighter on the Hive canvas.
[NEW] Accounts can now have an optional 4-digit PIN privacy gate; protected Referral IDs prompt for the PIN only after the account is found.
Cloud database schema now includes an additive access_pin column with a 4-digit validation check.
Minimap and Legend overlays are now collapsible to a single icon on the canvas, saving screen space on mobile. Click the icon to restore the full overlay.
Hive update reload now uses a cache-busted refresh and returns to the Hive without repeatedly showing the same update loop.
Hive Summary and Hive actions rollups now stand out visually as expandable sections.
Hive legend now explains the white question-mark placeholder subaccount marker.
Auto-created subaccounts now appear as white placeholder nodes with a question mark until their name and generated Referral ID are replaced.
Cloud database schema script now trims account text, rejects negative money fields, and adds an updated-at index without requiring destructive migrations.
Hive import and cloud sync now validate structure integrity before accepting or publishing accounts.
Hive import now reports how many main and sub accounts were loaded after validation.
Adding a 4th sub account now shows a rule warning without blocking the save, and unsupported extra subs are shown in grey.
Selected account and referral link now stay visible outside the Hive summary rollup, and account detail fields remain enabled while Save stays gated until Edit selected or Add child.
Reloading from the Hive update banner now returns directly to the Hive screen after refresh.
Hive account detail fields are now read-only until Edit selected or Add child is clicked.
Hive summary metrics are now inside a compact rollup so Branch Health, Tree Size, Leg Strength, Funded, and Filled Slots can be collapsed.
Hive panel actions are now tucked into a compact rollup so export, import, sync, reset, clear sample, and delete controls take less space.
Search now finds accounts by name or Referral ID.
Sync log entries now display account names directly beside Referral IDs.
Delete unfunded sub now removes only the selected account after confirming its Referral ID and name.
Sync log entries now show account names next to Referral IDs.
Release log refreshed for the protected Save or Cancel workflow in add and edit modes.
Edit selected now enters a protected edit session with Cancel, blocked canvas selection, and paused sync until Save or Cancel.
New account saves now batch-check the cloud database for duplicate Referral IDs before creating accounts.
Add mode now locks canvas selection until Save or Cancel and pauses sync while account entry is in progress.
Added an auto-create option that creates three linked subaccounts when adding a main account.
Added a local sync log for account additions, removals, and edits detected during cloud sync.
Auto-sync now refreshes from the cloud database on live changes, browser focus return, and timer polling.
Account saves now trim leading and trailing spaces from text fields before storing.
Referral ID loading now pulls only the selected account and its downline for upline privacy.
External Invited By IDs can now be stored even before that parent account exists in the Hive table.
Sync failures now show the specific cloud sync reason, including missing or wrong-type Invited By ID links.
App update notifications now remain visible above the Hive screen.
Loading by Referral ID now shows a visible success or failure toast near the top of the screen.
Successful Sync now actions show a polished confirmation toast.
Added JSON export and import so Hive structures can be updated offline and brought back for syncing.
Sync now publishes a local-only Hive to the cloud database when the entered Referral ID has no cloud structure yet.
New account forms now leave Referral ID empty for manual entry.
New account forms now keep the previous country selected and leave the name field empty.
Enabled Invited By ID on the first loaded account so a starter structure can connect to an existing Hive parent.
Added Clear sample for starting a personal Hive structure and Sync now plus automatic cloud refresh every few minutes.
Renamed Amount to Personal investment and added Total turnover across the editor, summaries, exports, and cloud database schema.
Improved Hive launch reliability from the calculator menu.
Tree dragging now works in focus mode and isolated branch views.
Hive version is visible in the top-right header.
